# cloudflare_secrets_store (Resource)

Accepted Permissions

- `Secrets Store Read`
- `Secrets Store Write`

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudflare_secrets_store" "example_secrets_store" {
  account_id = "985e105f4ecef8ad9ca31a8372d0c353"
  name = "service_x_keys"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String) Account Identifier
- `name` (String) The name of the store

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) Whenthe secret was created.
- `id` (String) Store Identifier
- `modified` (String) When the secret was modified.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import cloudflare_secrets_store.example '<account_id>/<store_id>'
```
